rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF DOROTHY MURPHY
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FINAL DISTRIBUTION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 5/18/20. No Letters were ever issued to the administrator (even after he was advised on 2/13/19). The estate cannot close until four months after Letters are issued to a general personal representative, as the published notice filed on 9/6/18 clearly indicated. If a creditor's claim is allowed but not paid, the creditor must receive notice. (No allowance or rejection of the creditor's claim appears to have been filed.) The petition was filed on 10/10/19; the proof of service also filed on 10/10/19 indicates that notice was mailed on 10/3/19, which was before the date of the hearing was known. Furthermore, the proof of service was verified on 9/30/19 -- before the notice was reportedly mailed (an impossibility), and item 2 is incomplete (address of the person who served the notice).
